name_en: In Stock Chanel✨Imported Sheepskin Full Hardware
name_cn:
In Stock Chanel✨Imported Sheepskin Full Hardware
New: Blue mixed with Rose Red, Color Clasp, Classic Color, Sheepskin
Twist closure with sliding chain, shoulder or crossbody interchangeable. The bag looks exquisite, stylish and versatile. This pink-gold color really grabs attention🤩 A mix of girly and sophisticated. With the rainbow clasp, it looks very queenly💋
Size 25.5 15 6cm
No.: 1112
